GUNTHER'S GOTTA GO

Single Player Prototype — Three.js + Rapier

Drive Gunther to safety before his iPad dies!

Navigate obstacles. Stop to let the iPad charge.

If the iPad battery hits 0%, Gunther LEAVES.

Loading physics engine...

Error loading game. See console.

GUNTHER: IN CAR
DISTANCE: 500m
WASD: Drive | SHIFT: Boost | C: Camera | Stop to charge iPad!
